allow: Bash(node -e "const {chromium} = require\('playwright'\); \(async\(\)=>{ const b = await chromium.launch\(\); const p = await b.newPage\(\); await p.setViewportSize\({width:1280,height:900}\); await p.goto\('http://127.0.0.1:8000/'\); await p.waitForTimeout\(1500\); await p.screenshot\({path:'resume_full.png', fullPage:true}\); await b.close\(\); console.log\('done'\); }\)\(\)")
